children.text: Pleasant day ahead for this Wednesday!
Enough clearing this morning will lead to some patchy fog.  Otherwise a decent day shaping up with a mix of sun and clouds with highs near 70.
Thursday: More strong storms possible. Tap here.
Strong to severe storms can't be ruled out on Thursday as another storm system moves right through Southern Indiana. Check out the videos below for timing and the chance for severe weather.
Papa John's 10 Miler: Updated forecast! Tap here.
While Saturday starts chilly for the Papa John's 10 Miler, it should be fairly pleasant by late morning. Check out more below in the video!
